subject: fix(ui): debug pill mobile positioning, copy feedback, BottomSheet simplification
body:
Six visual/UX/simplification fixes:

1. DebugPill mobile positioning: Pill and expanded panel overlapped with
   MobileNav dock at bottom:12px — invisible/untappable on mobile. Now
   detects mobile via matchMedia('max-width: 1023px') and offsets to
   bottom:72px. Responsive — updates on viewport change via listener.

2. Copy feedback: Copy button shows 'Copied!' (green) or 'Failed' (red)
   for 1.5s after click. Previously fired async clipboard operation with
   zero visual indication to the user.

3. Removed dead embed check: Inner DebugPillInner embed guard on line 84
   was unreachable — mountDebugPill already skips mounting in embed mode.
   Removed the inner check and the unused effects it triggered.

4. Shared formatTime: Exported from debugLog.js, imported in DebugPill.
   Eliminated duplicate HH:MM:SS.mmm formatting (was inline in both
   DebugPill and debugGenerateReport).

5. BottomSheet effectiveSnap falsy zero: snapPoint || SNAP_HALF treated
   SNAP_CLOSED (0) as falsy, falling through to SNAP_HALF. Fixed with
   nullish coalescing (??). Content maxHeight was wrong for closed sheets.

6. BottomSheet handler merge: Identical handleTouchEnd and
   handleTouchCancel collapsed into single finishTouch callback.

Tags: ui, ux, mobile, cleanup, simplification
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
